projects.meteor.title: Meteor — Connected Weather Station (IoT)
projects.meteor.desc: Full development of a weather station (Tp3 Amoc). Integration of microcontrollers, communication protocols (MQTT/I2C), and visualization dashboard.
projects.castle.title: Castle of SFML — 3D Engine & Game
projects.castle.desc: Developed a 3D rendering engine (Raycaster) and survival game in C# (.NET 6). Implemented BFS pathfinding AI and designed a modular architecture with automated testing (xUnit, CI/CD).

projects.omnivox.desc: Created a custom dark theme for the Omnivox platform to improve accessibility and visual comfort.
